steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence says Old Faithful seems inhospitable to life. The second says it is home to many bacteria species and is almost a cradle for biodiversity. The transition must show that the second fact is true despite the first.

steps.title: Reject result and restatement cues
steps.content: A signals a result, B signals a specific example, and D signals a restatement. The remaining transition means "nevertheless," which fits the contrast between apparent harshness and actual biodiversity. The answer is C.
